metadata.originalStory: 採茶姑娘出發！從一片葉開始🍃帶你認識山城的味道

kimo.name: Kimo
kimo.appearance: Young energetic woman, bright eyes, expressive facial features, tied-back hair
kimo.outfit: Traditional tea-picking floral sleeves, a wide-brimmed straw hat, and a casual outdoor vest
kimo.personality: Adventurous, genuine, and easily excited by food

group.name: The Tea Crew
group.appearance: A group of cheerful young friends, diverse looks
group.outfit: Casual summer travel outfits and sun protection gear

shots.title: 以「Kimo吃下果實後的扭曲表情特寫。」做為開頭，加入震動文字與富有衝擊力的特效
shots.emotion: 參考時間軸: 02:18-02:20 建議:搭配強烈震動字體:「天啊!這竟然能吃?」
shots.shotPrompt: Extreme close-up on face, eyes squinting, mouth twisted in a bitter reaction after biting a green fruit, intense natural sunlight, tea garden background blurred.
shots.finalPrompt:
Young energetic woman, bright eyes, expressive facial features, tied-back hair,
Traditional tea-picking floral sleeves, a wide-brimmed straw hat, and a casual outdoor vest,
Adventurous, genuine, and easily excited by food,

Extreme close-up on face, eyes squinting, mouth twisted in a bitter reaction after biting a green fruit, intense natural sunlight, tea garden background blurred.,

high quality,

shots.title:
藏鏡人：「要吐出來嗎？」
Kimo：「我吞掉了」
shots.emotion: 參考時間軸: 02:22-02:24 以搞笑對話讓觀眾會心一笑
shots.shotPrompt: Close-up side profile view, Kimo looking slightly guilty but funny, talking with her mouth closed as if she just swallowed something, lush green tea foliage background.

shots.title: 製茶五步曲快剪：採茶 -> 萎凋 -> 揉捻 -> 發酵 -> 乾燥。把 5 個步驟濃縮在 5 秒內快速帶過
shots.emotion: 參考時間軸: 02:55-03:12 配合文青音樂,從搞笑鬼轉到文青的反差感,使用簡潔俐落的打字機字卡快速閃過工序名稱。
shots.shotPrompt: A fast dynamic collage sequence of tea processing: picking leaves, sun-withering, metallic rolling machine spinning, fermentation trays, drying oven heat haze, high energy.
shots.finalPrompt:
A fast dynamic collage sequence of tea processing: picking leaves, sun-withering, metallic rolling machine spinning, fermentation trays, drying oven heat haze, high energy.,

natural lighting, high resolution, clean composition, soft focus background,

vertical 9:16 aspect ratio,
high quality

shots.title: 專屬體驗：將茶葉與乾燥花朵混合。加入點綴：剪入一句成員微吐槽「手太笨了」的搞笑對白
shots.emotion: 參考時間軸: 03:49 附近建議: 在半透明毛玻璃標籤旁,跳出對話框氣泡 UI,增加互動可愛感
shots.shotPrompt: Close-up on hands gently blending deep green tea leaves with delicate pink and yellow dried flower petals in a glass bowl, soft hand gestures, cute semi-transparent glassmorphism dialogue bubble with cute Taiwanese text '手太笨了'.
shots.finalPrompt:
A group of cheerful young friends, diverse looks,
Casual summer travel outfits and sun protection gear,
High-energy and supportive,

shots.title: 紅茶湯特寫。展示辛苦過後的成果
shots.emotion: 參考時間軸: 01:21 加入點綴: 0.2 秒極速閃過「爆汁豆乾」特寫,製造視覺殘影與潛意識彩蛋。
shots.shotPrompt: Macro shot of clear amber-red black tea being poured gracefully into a transparent glass cup, glowing under golden sunlight, with a split-second motion-blurred flash of a delicious juicy braised tofu appearing in the background.

shots.title: 【關鍵懸念】眾人舉起杯子，杯緣即將碰到嘴唇的瞬間————畫面強制切斷！或是模糊轉場
shots.emotion: 參考時間軸: 04:37 附近,留下究竟好不好喝的懸念,吊足觀眾胃口,增加點閱率。
shots.shotPrompt: Dynamic shot of a group raising their tea glasses in a toast, the glass rims just about to touch their lips, sudden dramatic motion blur freeze frame right before drinking, outdoor wooden deck.
